character_creation_workflow.description: Optimized 2-step character creation using initial model set

model_stack.name: Qwen Hyperdetailed Stack
model_stack.description: Optimized for character consistency and quality

step1_portrait.description: Generate high-quality character portrait optimized for Qwen model stack
step1_portrait.system_prompt: masterpiece, best quality, highly detailed character portrait, single person, solo, consistent facial features, professional lighting, sharp focus
step1_portrait.prompt_suffix: detailed face, detailed eyes, detailed skin texture, professional character design
step1_portrait.negative_prompt: low quality, blurry, distorted, deformed, ugly, bad anatomy, worst quality, multiple people, crowd, extra faces, extra limbs

step2_multiview.description: Generate consistent multiview using Qwen reference processing
step2_multiview.system_prompt: same person, consistent identity, consistent facial features, same outfit, same character, maintain reference appearance

wildcard_prompts.front_view: (front view:1.4), (facing camera:1.3), full body character sheet, {__pose_type__}, {__gaze_direction__}, {__action_detail__}, same person, consistent identity, hyperdetailed, ultra realistic, clean white background, professional character design, consistent lighting, make sure the entire body is visible
wildcard_prompts.back_view: (back view:1.4), (rear view:1.3), full body character sheet, {__pose_type__}, rear perspective, {__action_detail__}, same person, consistent identity, hyperdetailed, ultra realistic, clean white background, professional character design, consistent lighting, make sure the entire body is visible
wildcard_prompts.side_view: (side view:1.4), (profile:1.3), full body character sheet, {__pose_type__}, profile perspective, {__action_detail__}, same person, consistent identity, hyperdetailed, ultra realistic, clean white background, professional character design, consistent lighting, make sure the entire body is visible

static_prompts.front_view: (front view:1.4), (facing camera:1.3), full body character sheet, standing pose, looking at camera, hands at sides, same person, consistent identity, hyperdetailed, ultra realistic, clean white background, professional character design, consistent lighting, make sure the entire body is visible
static_prompts.back_view: (back view:1.4), (rear view:1.3), full body character sheet, standing pose, rear perspective, hands at sides, same person, consistent identity, hyperdetailed, ultra realistic, clean white background, professional character design, consistent lighting, make sure the entire body is visible
static_prompts.side_view: (side view:1.4), (profile:1.3), full body character sheet, standing pose, profile perspective, hands at sides, same person, consistent identity, hyperdetailed, ultra realistic, clean white background, professional character design, consistent lighting, make sure the entire body is visible

step2_multiview.negative_prompt: low quality, blurry, distorted, deformed, ugly, bad anatomy, worst quality, multiple people, crowd, extra faces, extra limbs, inconsistent character, different person, face change, outfit change
